description_long: This is a pair of athletic sneakers with a sleek, modern design, predominantly light pink in color. The shoes feature a low-cut profile with a rounded toe and a smooth, seamless upper, complemented by blue laces arranged in a standard criss-cross pattern. Both shoes display a large, white Nike Swoosh logo on the outer side, adding a distinctive brand identity. The soles are white and appear to be made of lightweight foam or rubber, designed for comfort and everyday urban use. The overall construction suggests a combination of synthetic materials and fabric, with a soft, semi-matte finish. The shoes are in pristine, new condition with no visible signs of wear or dirt.
description: A pair of light pink Nike sneakers with blue laces, white soles, and a large white Swoosh logo, featuring a smooth, modern design in new condition.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, blue laces, and symmetrical shape of both shoes.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large white Nike Swoosh logo and the low-cut, streamlined profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel area and the clean, unmarked back of the shoes.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the Nike Swoosh and the overall smooth, seamless construction.
attribute_logo: Large white Nike Swoosh on the outer side of each shoe
